accept: --full flag on act show disables truncation
human-friendly output preserved; only the truncation suppressed
payload.description: act show <id> truncates description and close_reason with "see --json for full text" but the use case is usually wanting longer human-readable text, not JSON. Add --full to disable truncation while preserving the human-friendly format. Source: docs/aac-website-dogfood-debrief.md §7.
payload.title: cli: act show --full to disable description and reason truncation
